metadata.description: Deployment location. Defaults to resource group location.
Hub VNet name created by infra-no-vm deployment.
Gateway subnet name in the hub VNet.
VPN gateway SKU. VpnGw1 is the smallest SKU that supports OpenVPN + Entra ID auth.
P2S address pool CIDR. Must not overlap with any VNet or on-prem address space.
Optional route prefixes to advertise to P2S clients (for example hub/spoke VNet CIDRs).
Microsoft Entra tenant ID used for VPN authentication.
Azure VPN first-party app ID for Azure public cloud.
AadIssuer URL. For Azure public cloud use: https://sts.windows.net/<tenant-id>/
Optional inbound DNS IP to set on the existing hub VNet (safe patch update, not VNet recreation). Leave empty to skip.
Tags to apply to VPN resources.

resources.name: [parameters('vpnGatewayName')]
resources.properties: [shallowMerge(createArray(createObject('activeActive', false(), 'enableBgp', false(), 'gatewayType', 'Vpn', 'vpnType', 'RouteBased', 'vpnGatewayGeneration', 'Generation1', 'sku', createObject('name', parameters('vpnGatewaySku'), 'tier', parameters('vpnGatewaySku')), 'ipConfigurations', createArray(createObject('name', 'gw-ipconfig-01', 'properties', createObject('privateIPAllocationMethod', 'Dynamic', 'subnet', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('hubVnetName'), parameters('gatewaySubnetName'))), 'publicIPAddress', createObject('id', resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('vpnPublicIpName'))))))), variables('gatewayCustomRoutes'), createObject('vpnClientConfiguration', createObject('vpnClientAddressPool', createObject('addressPrefixes', createArray(parameters('vpnClientAddressPoolPrefix'))), 'vpnAuthenticationTypes', createArray('AAD'), 'vpnClientProtocols', createArray('OpenVPN'), 'aadTenant', variables('aadTenantUrl'), 'aadAudience', parameters('aadAudience'), 'aadIssuer', parameters('aadIssuer')))))]

profileGenerateCommand.value: [format('az network vnet-gateway vpn-client generate --resource-group {0} --name {1} --processor-architecture Amd64', resourceGroup().name, parameters('vpnGatewayName'))]

hubVnetDnsUpdateCommand.value: [if(empty(trim(parameters('hubDnsServerIp'))), '', format('az network vnet update --resource-group {0} --name {1} --dns-servers {2}', resourceGroup().name, parameters('hubVnetName'), parameters('hubDnsServerIp')))]
